notes: CLI gateway timeout after 10s on each send; gateway.log shows Sent message for both at 2026-04-16T15:45:21 and 15:46:08 -07:00.
message1_tldr:
*OpenClaw × Cursor — daily state of the DAO (not a manual post from Gary)*

We made the public site easier to follow: truesight.me now surfaces a live, paginated list of published Beer Hall digests from git so anyone can skim what changed without hunting repos.

We deepened the DApp digital-signature onboarding story on the blog—clearer diagrams, concrete links into the Main Ledger workbook, and a small public Python demo so contributors see how verification lines up with the sheet.

Agroverse retail and ops moved forward: partner pages can show venue inventory from published JSON, the shop shipped new 81% bar SKUs plus GTIN-style catalog metadata, and automation now publishes store and partner inventory snapshots daily for downstream tools.

The browser DApp is smoother for contributors verifying email from the ledger (auto-submit when the link already carries proof), and tokenomics / Apps Script work kept QR sales, Stripe shipping, and clasp deploy hygiene aligned with the sheets the field team relies on.

Details + links in next message.
message2_shipped:
*Shipped*

- truesight.me: Beer Hall digest previews on the home page + paginated archive at beerhall/updates — https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/commit/8a6cca6
- Blog: DApp digital signature email onboarding protocol + follow-on posts (diagrams, ledger links, public demo anchor) — https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/25 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/31 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/33
- go_to_market: daily Agroverse inventory JSON publish + partner venue inventory sync — https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/48 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/49
- agroverse_shop_beta: partner venue inventory snippets, GTIN/catalog feed work, AGL2 taste-profile chart — https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/69 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/68 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/72
- dapp: auto-submit email verification when em+vk are present on create_signature — https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/154
- tokenomics: digital signature Python demo + Edgar verification email split to admin Apps Script + clasp/QR hygiene — https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/222 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/219 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/221
- agentic_ai_context: QR batch + shop SKU checklist docs — https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/16
